languages.text: {n}Арджента смотрит на вас, словно потеряв дар речи. Наконец она произносит негромко, но отчетливо:{/n} "Если вам недостаточно просьбы Ангела Бога-Императора — услышьте мою. Молю вас: немедля вызволим святого воина из этой богомерзкой машины!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Арджента смотрит на вас, словно потеряв дар речи. Наконец она произносит негромко, но отчетливо:{/n} "Если вам недостаточно просьбы Ангела Бога-Императора — услышьте мою. Молю вас: немедля вызволим святого воина из этой богомерзкой машины!"
traits.speaker: ArgentaCompanion

languages.text: {n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"
languages.original_text: {n}Арджента смотрит на вас, словно потеряв дар речи. Наконец она произносит негромко, но отчетливо:{/n} "Если вам недостаточно просьбы Ангела Бога-Императора — услышьте мою. Молю вас: немедля вызволим святого воина из этой богомерзкой машины!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly:{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

[draft]{n}Argenta stares at you as if robbed of the power of speech, her silence louder than any rebuke. At last, she says quietly yet distinctly,{/n} "If a plea from an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough to sway you, then heed mine. I beg you: let us free {nc|the son of Sanguinius|this holy warrior} from the clutches of this profane machine!"

{n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly:{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

{n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

{n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

languages.text: {n}Argenta te mira como si hubiera perdido el habla. Cuando rompe su silencio, su voz es baja pero decidida:{/n} «Si el ruego de un ángel del Emperador no le basta, escuche el mío. Se lo ruego, ¡liberemos inmediatamente a este sagrado guerrero de esa máquina abominable!».
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta te mira como si hubiera perdido el habla. Cuando rompe su silencio, su voz es baja pero decidida:{/n} «Si el ruego de un ángel del Emperador no le basta, escuche el mío. Se lo ruego, ¡liberemos inmediatamente a este sagrado guerrero de esa máquina abominable!».

languages.text: {n}阿洁塔凝视着你，仿佛震惊得说不出话来。终于，她开口了，声音很轻，却字字分明。{/n}“倘若一位神皇天使的恳求对你而言仍不够分量，那就听听我的吧。我恳求你：让我们立刻将那位神圣的战士从那架可憎的机器中解救出来！”
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}阿洁塔凝视着你，仿佛震惊得说不出话来。终于，她开口了，声音很轻，却字字分明。{/n}“倘若一位神皇天使的恳求对你而言仍不够分量，那就听听我的吧。我恳求你：让我们立刻将那位神圣的战士从那架可憎的机器中解救出来！”

languages.text: {n}Argenta vous dévisage comme si les mots lui manquaient. Enfin, elle prend la parole, d'une voix basse mais ferme.{/n} « Si la supplique de l'ange de l'Empereur-Dieu ne vous suffit pas, alors écoutez la mienne. Je vous en conjure, délivrons ce guerrier saint de cette abominable machine sans plus tarder ! »
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta vous dévisage comme si les mots lui manquaient. Enfin, elle prend la parole, d'une voix basse mais ferme.{/n} « Si la supplique de l'ange de l'Empereur-Dieu ne vous suffit pas, alors écoutez la mienne. Je vous en conjure, délivrons ce guerrier saint de cette abominable machine sans plus tarder ! »

languages.text: {n}Argenta, nutku tutulmuşçasına sana bakıyor. Sonunda sessiz ama net bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Eğer Tanrı İmparator'un Meleği'nin ricası sana yetmiyorsa benimkini dinle. Sana yalvarıyorum: Kutsal savaşçıyı şu iğrenç makineden gecikmeden kurtaralım!"
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta, nutku tutulmuşçasına sana bakıyor. Sonunda sessiz ama net bir şekilde konuşuyor.{/n} "Eğer Tanrı İmparator'un Meleği'nin ricası sana yetmiyorsa benimkini dinle. Sana yalvarıyorum: Kutsal savaşçıyı şu iğrenç makineden gecikmeden kurtaralım!"

languages.text: {n}Argenta starrt dich sprachlos an. Schließlich sagt sie leise, aber bestimmt: {/n} "Wenn Euch die Bitte eines Engels des Gottimperators nicht reicht, dann hört bitte mich an. Ich flehe Euch an: Lasst uns diesen heiligen Krieger umgehend aus dieser abscheulichen Maschine befreien!"
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Argenta starrt dich sprachlos an. Schließlich sagt sie leise, aber bestimmt: {/n} "Wenn Euch die Bitte eines Engels des Gottimperators nicht reicht, dann hört bitte mich an. Ich flehe Euch an: Lasst uns diesen heiligen Krieger umgehend aus dieser abscheulichen Maschine befreien!"

languages.text: {n}アルジェンタは言葉を失ったようにあなたを見つめる。そして、静かにだがはっきりとした声で言った。{/n}「神帝の天使の訴えがあなたには足りないのなら、私の訴えを聞いてください。どうか、その聖なる戦士をこの忌まわしい機械から一刻も早く解放してください！」
languages.original_text: {n}Argenta stares at you as if struck speechless. Finally, she speaks, quietly but distinctly,{/n} "If the plea of an Angel of the God-Emperor is not enough for you, then hear mine. I beseech you: let us deliver that holy warrior from this abominable machine without delay!"

traits.locale_text: {n}アルジェンタは言葉を失ったようにあなたを見つめる。そして、静かにだがはっきりとした声で言った。{/n}「神帝の天使の訴えがあなたには足りないのなら、私の訴えを聞いてください。どうか、その聖なる戦士をこの忌まわしい機械から一刻も早く解放してください！」
